subject: Updating Pom.xml for AAI-Simulator
commit_message:
Updating Pom.xml for AAI-Simulator

Issue-ID: INT-1712
Signed-off-by: ajay_dp001 <ajay.deep.singh@est.tech>
Change-Id: I5766ef7caa7cadf6f32ea22add662377cc8da2a7

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-aai-simulator-docker-verify/1/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-aai-simulator-docker-verify/1/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/integration-master-aai-simulator-docker-verify/1

Patch Set 1:

> > Hi Bartek, Please can you share if you tried at your end..?

Yes, I've been trying today. It fails. The issue is that maven can't find aai-simulator in Onap's repository: 

[INFO] Scanning for projects...
Downloading from onap-snapshots: https://nexus.onap.org/content/repositories/snapshots/org/onap/aai-simulator/aai-simulator/1.0-SNAPSHOT/maven-metadata.xml

The path https://nexus.onap.org/content/repositories/snapshots/org/onap/aai-simulator doesn't exist in repo.

So if the build is not failing for you it means you have this artifact in local cache...

Please clean the cache (most likely it's ~/.m2/repository, remove it) and try again.

If it then succeeds for you then please show me maven log part that states that is successfully downloaded aai-simulator (similar to "Downloaded from onap-snapshots (...)).

Patch Set 1:

any update?
shall we abandon this patch?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> any update?
> shall we abandon this patch?

Well I wasn't able to sort out why does the build fail in CI, my assumption is still that there is an issue with the POM file but didn't get any further comments from Ajay.

If we simply abandon this, future builds for aai-simulator will fail. Even first ever build of the docker in docker-merge job for this sim failed: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/integration/+/111623

Only solution without fixing pom would be to remove docker-verify job. The build is failing on my side too.
